member.name: T:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll
member.summary: A wrapper for modelphysics with utilities

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.HitReactionTranslationEnd
member.summary: When translation ends during a hit reaction, as a fraction of the total duration.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.HitReactionRotationStart
member.summary: When rotation kicks in during a hit reaction, as a fraction of the total duration.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.HitReactionTranslationScale
member.summary: Multiplier for hit reaction translation displacement.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.HitReactionRotationScale
member.summary: Multiplier for hit reaction rotation displacement.

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.UpdateHitReactions
member.summary: Update all active hit reactions, called from OnUpdate

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.MoveObjectsFromAnimations
member.summary: Teleport all body GameObjects to their animation bone transforms

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.MoveBodiesFromAnimations
member.summary: Kinematically move all rigidbodies toward their animation bone transforms

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.EnableJointMotors(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Enable motors on all joints with the given frequency and damping

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.DisableJointMotors
member.summary: Disable and reset motors on all joints

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.MoveJointsFromAnimations(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Drive every joint toward its animation pose using joint motors

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.PartialRagdollOverrides
member.summary: Bones that currently have a partial ragdoll override

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.RagdollBone(Sandbox.BoneCollection.Bone,ShrimpleRagdolls.RagdollMode,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Ragdolls a single bone and optionally all its children
member.param: Which mode to set the bone (Only works for Enabled and Motor)
Include all children of the target bone

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.UnragdollBone(Sandbox.BoneCollection.Bone,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Unragdoll the bone optionally all its children

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.ClearPartialRagdoll
member.summary: Clear all partial ragdoll overrides, returning full control to the global mode.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.PartialRagdollConfig
member.summary: Bone overrides to apply on start and whenever this property is changed. Key is the bone name, value is the ragdoll mode.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.Gravity
member.summary: Enable/Disable gravity to all bodies.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GravityScale
member.summary: Set the gravity scale to all bodies.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.LinearDamping
member.summary: Set the linear damping to all bodies.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.AngularDamping
member.summary: Set the angular damping to all bodies.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.RigidbodyFlags
member.summary: Rigidbody flags applied to all bodies.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.Locking
member.summary: Rigidbody locking applied to all bodies.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.MassOverride
member.summary:
Sets the mass override of this ragdoll
Each body part will have their proportionally changed so they combine to the desired total mass
Set to 0 for the default value

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.StartAsleep
member.summary: All bodies will be put to sleep on start.

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.Surface
member.summary:
Surface to apply to all colliders
Set to null for the surfaces defined in the ragdoll

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.MassCenter
member.summary: Calculate the center of mass of the ragdoll in world space based on its bodies' masses and masscenters

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetMassCenter
member.summary: Calculate the center of mass of the ragdoll in world space based on its bodies' masses and masscenters
member.returns: World position of the combined center of mass

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetModelMass
member.summary: Calculate the mass of the ragdoll using the model data

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.WakePhysics
member.summary: Makes sure to wake up all bodies

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SleepPhysics
member.summary: Sets all rigidbodies to sleep

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SetGravity(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets gravity to all rigid bodies

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SetGravityScale(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets gravity scale to all rigid bodies

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SetLinearDamping(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the linear damping to all rigid bodies

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SetAngularDamping(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the angular damping to all rigid bodies

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SetSurface(Sandbox.Surface)
member.summary: Apply a surface to every collider

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SetColliderFlags(Sandbox.ColliderFlags)
member.summary: Apply collider flags to every collider

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SetMassOverride(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the mass override, each body piece will have their mass proportional so that the total combines to the desired value

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.SetupPhysics
member.summary: Sets up all physics related settings for colliders and rigidbodies

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.Move(Transform)
member.summary: Move the ragdoll without affecting its velocity or simulating collisions
member.param: The target transform, the entire ragdoll will be moved so that its root matches

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.ApplyVelocity(Vector3)
member.summary: Apply a velocity to the ragdoll as a whole rather than on every body individually

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.ApplyAngularVelocity(Vector3)
member.summary: Apply an angular velocity to the ragdoll, spinning it around the mass center
member.param: The axis to spin around and speed in radians per second

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.ApplyTorque(Vector3)
member.summary: Apply a torque to the ragdoll, causing angular acceleration based on each body's inertia

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.ApplyForce(Vector3)
member.summary: Apply a force to the ragdoll, causing acceleration based on each body's mass

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.ApplyImpulse(Vector3)
member.summary: Apply an impulse to the ragdoll, instantly changing velocity based on each body's mass

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetBodyByBoneName(System.String)
member.summary: Get a body by bone name

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetBodyByBoneIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a body by bone index

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetBodyByBone(Sandbox.BoneCollection.Bone)
member.summary: Get a body by bone

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetSignedAngleAroundAxis(Rotation,Vector3)
member.summary: Returns the signed angle in degrees that rotates around . Picks a reference vector perpendicular to the axis, rotates it, projects onto the plane, then atan2s the result.

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetRagdollTransform(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get the ragdoll's ideal transform from the provided bone
member.param: Which bone to base off of
The final renderer's transform should match the bone's transform

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetDescendantBones(Sandbox.BoneCollection.Bone)
member.summary: Returns the given bone and all of its descendants in the skeleton

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetDescendantBones(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the given bone and all of its descendants in the skeleton

member.name: M:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.GetDescendantBones(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the given bone and all of its descendants in the skeleton

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.ActiveLerpTime
member.summary: How fast bodies move to the desired position in active mode

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.MotorFrequency
member.summary: Motor joints frequency

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.MotorDamping
member.summary: Motor joints damping

member.name: P:ShrimpleRagdolls.ShrimpleRagdoll.ModeChanged
member.summary: Before, After

member.name: F:ShrimpleRagdolls.RagdollMode.None
member.summary: Ragdolling is disabled completely

member.name: F:ShrimpleRagdolls.RagdollMode.Passive
member.summary: Collisions but follows animations 1 to 1

member.name: F:ShrimpleRagdolls.RagdollMode.Active
member.summary: Physically simulated and tried to follow animations

member.name: F:ShrimpleRagdolls.RagdollMode.Enabled
member.summary: Completely physical driven, flops around

member.name: F:ShrimpleRagdolls.RagdollMode.Motor
member.summary: Physical driven but uses joint motors to follow animations
